sources_consulted.result: Usable salary figures for President, Prime Minister, Speaker, Cabinet ministers, and MPs from April 2023, citing Parliament of Albania.
Confirmed IPU had no numeric basic-salary export for Albania.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 2 because the article is secondary even though it cites Parliament of Albania.

sources_consulted.result: Found the organic remuneration framework for deputies, but no current numeric salary amount.
Found a 2014 secondary report on an 8.2 percent increase, but not enough structured current amount/provenance to ingest.
Found a 2019 secondary report saying salary base equivalent to about EUR 1,700, but no official local-currency schedule was found in this pass.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until an official numeric salary schedule or official gazette resolution is found.

sources_consulted.result: Official sitting page linked the 2025 Senate and House remuneration order.
Official PDF contains 2024 annual salaries and allowances for House and Senate positions.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 1 because the source is the official Parliament PDF.

sources_consulted.result: Found the Parliamentarians (Salaries and Allowances) Act with schedule amounts, but the displayed schedule notes the relevant new columns expired on 30 June 2011.
Confirmed members are paid salaries but IPU shows no numeric basic-salary amount.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until a current active salary order or budget schedule is found.

sources_consulted.result: Found legal rule that professional deputies and Council members receive monthly remuneration equal to a minister's wage, but no numeric current minister wage was found.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until the referenced minister salary scale or an official payroll amount is found.

sources_consulted.result: Found that deputies receive the same remuneration as their workplace during duties, but no uniform numeric parliamentary salary exists in the source.
Constitution text confirms deputies earn the same salary or pay as at their work center.

reviewed_countries.notes: Do not force a fake uniform salary where the public rule says pay follows each deputy's existing workplace remuneration.

sources_consulted.result: Found constitutional basis that salaries and allowances are prescribed by law, but no current numeric parliamentary schedule was found.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until the active Dominica parliamentary salaries law or estimates schedule is located.

sources_consulted.result: Found a secondary report claiming FCFA 51 million per year for deputies/senators, but not an official schedule.
Found old archived IPU figure in French francs plus session allowance; too stale for current ingestion.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until an official National Assembly/Senate or finance-law schedule is found.

sources_consulted.result: IPU country was in the no-row queue; no usable numeric remuneration source was found in this pass.

reviewed_countries.notes: Continue with Guinea official transition council/budget sources.

sources_consulted.result: IPU country was in the no-row queue; no usable numeric remuneration source was found in this pass.

sources_consulted.publisher: Portal Unico de Transparencia / IAIP Honduras
sources_consulted.result: Official portal lists February 2026 'REMUNERACION A DIPUTADOS' for Congreso Nacional.
Scanned official PDF table gives assigned monthly salaries for President, vice president tiers, alternate vice presidents, secretaries, pro-secretaries, deputies, and alternate deputies.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 1 because the source is the official transparency portal and signed/stamped Congreso Nacional PDF.

sources_consulted.result: Usable Saint Lucia survey response with exact 2020-2021 annual amounts for Cabinet minister, non-Cabinet minister, Prime Minister as Leader of the House, Leader of the Opposition, Speaker, Deputy Speaker, senators, Senate President, and Senate Deputy President.
Confirmed IPU had no numeric basic-salary export for Saint Lucia.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 2 because CPA is a reputable structured secondary survey source. The lower-house ordinary member salary was 'Not answered' in the CPA report and was not imputed.

sources_consulted.result: Found a fact-check estimating legal ceilings and allowances, but not an official exact salary schedule.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until an official Majles payroll/rules source with exact amounts is found.

sources_consulted.publisher: Asamblea Legislativa de El Salvador transparency portal
sources_consulted.result: Official transparency page links the 2023 salary-law PDF for the Legislative Assembly.
Official salary-law PDF gives monthly salary, representation, and transport/communication totals for President, Vice Presidents, Secretaries, parliamentary group coordinators, and deputies.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 1. The amount field stores the PDF's monthly total compensation for each role, not salary-only base pay.

sources_consulted.result: Official budget-estimate page links the FY2025-2026 approved budget document.

Official approved budget statutory-payments section gives annual base salary plus allowance totals for Head of State, Prime Minister, Deputy Prime Minister, Speaker, Deputy Speaker, Leader of Opposition, and Deputy Leader of Opposition.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 1. Aggregate totals for ministers, associate ministers, and ordinary MPs were not divided into inferred per-person amounts.

sources_consulted.result: Official Prescription of Salaries Act 2022 Revised Edition Schedule 17 gives taxable salary amounts for Governor-General, Prime Minister, Speaker, Ministers, and Members of Parliament.
Confirmed IPU had no numeric basic-salary export for Tuvalu.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 1. Currency is stored as AUD because Tuvalu uses Australian dollars alongside the Tuvaluan dollar.

sources_consulted.publisher: Kiribati Ministry of Finance and Economic Development
sources_consulted.result: Found the 2025 recurrent budget with aggregate statutory salary lines, but no explicit per-office parliamentary salary schedule.
Confirmed IPU had no numeric basic-salary export for Kiribati.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until an official Maneaba or salary-determination source gives exact per-role amounts.

sources_consulted.result: Official legislation page links the Organic Law 05-004/AU PDF fixing deputy indemnities.
Official PDF states the monthly base indemnity for deputies of the Assembly of the Union is KMF 500,000.

reviewed_countries.notes: Rows are trust_level 1. Only the base monthly indemnity is ingested; separately determined specific advantages are not quantified in the source.

sources_consulted.result: Official constitutional law text says deputy salaries are set by the President, but this source does not provide current numeric amounts.
Official legal source confirms institutional framework but no current salary table was found in this pass.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until the presidential salary-setting act or official payroll/budget table with numeric deputy amounts is found.

sources_consulted.result: Transparency page search snippets show 'Articulo 11.3 Planilla', but direct retrieval redirected to the homepage and did not expose the planilla file URL.
Official news item confirms the planilla data exists on the website, but it does not contain a parliamentary office salary schedule.

reviewed_countries.notes: Hold until the current Article 11.3 planilla file URL or another official salary table is retrievable.
